news.title: Bank of Canada holds rates as inflation risks cloud policy outlook
news.summary: Investing.com -- The Bank of Canada left its benchmark interest rate unchanged at 2.25% on Wednesday, extending a pause that has now lasted five consecutive meetings as policymakers grapple with a weakening domestic economy and renewed inflationary pressures tied to higher energy costs. The decision matched market expectations, but the central bank’s message underscored a growing policy challenge.
